name: Action Package Reader
description: 当用户需要审查、改进、迁移或复用一个已有 TooGraph Action 包时使用；它会只读读取该包的 manifest、文档和脚本内容。
llmInstruction: Choose exactly one target action key from the graph state or user request, and optionally choose source_scope as user or official. This read-only action returns action_key and source_scope.

stateInputSchema.name: Target Action Key
stateInputSchema.description: Existing Action key to read. Optional when the LLM can infer the key from the request.

llmOutputSchema.name: Source Scope
llmOutputSchema.description: Optional source scope: user or official. Leave empty to prefer user then official.

stateOutputSchema.name: Success
stateOutputSchema.description: Whether an Action package was found and read.

stateOutputSchema.name: Action Package
stateOutputSchema.description: Structured Action package metadata and UTF-8 file contents.

stateOutputSchema.name: Result
stateOutputSchema.description: Short read summary or validation error.
